summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or close actions are planned because this job disables merge/fix/raise_pr, instant close is disabled, low-signal closeout is disabled, and the remaining open PRs require maintainer technical/proof review rather than backlog cleanup.

Already closed refs are historical evidence only; keep it closed and do not emit a closure mutation.
Maintainer/proof review is required before deciding whether this cron scheduler fix should continue, be repaired, or be closed outside this inventory shard.
Maintainer technical judgment is required to decide whether the server-side startup barrier is still desirable given the already-landed startup retry work.
Maintainer review is required to determine whether the P1 timeout-compensation review finding has been addressed and whether dependency-guard failures are relevant.
Keep the issue open and related to candidate PR #68196; closure or fixed-by-candidate routing would be premature.
